This repository uses the plugin name "This Is My URL Shadow" (slug `thisismyurl-shadow`) as an intentional product decision following the WordPress.org rename of 2026.

When assisting in this workspace:
- Do not suggest renaming the plugin, changing the slug, or rebranding it as part of compliance, review, or submission guidance.
- Focus compliance and submission work on code, packaging, behavior, copy accuracy, and WordPress.org policy alignment without proposing name changes.
- Treat existing plugin naming as fixed unless the user explicitly asks to revisit branding.
- Historical references to the previous name "WPShadow" should remain only in `CHANGELOG.md`, the `readme.txt` changelog section, and `includes/systems/core/class-rename-migration-2026.php` (the legacy data migrator). Everywhere else, the brand is "This Is My URL Shadow" and the slug is `thisismyurl-shadow`.
